pi_items.source: Web search for NORAD IDs of GOES 16 (41866), GOES 18 (51850), and METEOSAT 11 (40732).
Web search for NORAD IDs of NOAA 19 (33591), METOP-C (43689), and SUOMI NPP (37849).
Web search for National Hurricane Center coordinates, locating it at FIU campus around 25.75N.
Web search for National Hurricane Center coordinates, locating it at FIU campus around 80.38W.
Web search for National Hurricane Center elevation (FIU campus), which is officially 16-23 feet (5-7 meters) above sea level, not 2 meters.

privileged_info_summary: The NORAD IDs for the requested satellites were successfully verified: GOES 16 (41866), GOES 18 (51850), METEOSAT 11 (40732), NOAA 19 (33591), METOP-C (43689), and SUOMI NPP (37849). The target coordinates for the Miami National Hurricane Center (25.7543 N, -80.3823 W) accurately point to the facility on the FIU campus. However, the requested altitude of 2 meters contradicts the actual physical elevation of the NHC building, which is approximately 5 to 7 meters (16-23 feet) above sea level.
